00:24:35	Reno - ZKNOX:	basically as no linearity exist, solution is garbled circuits, but highly inefficient
00:25:46	Ooia oo [OKX]:	Is there an alternative from garbled circuits?
00:31:01	Matteo Vena | Riva Labs:	Replying to "basically as no line..."

Hey Reno any reading materials that you suggest?
00:31:17	Reno - ZKNOX:	Basically we are trying to preserve aggregation, which is why we use hash based, and will tweak everything else to have this fit in.

Maybe tweaking consensus to be compliant with the industry for all the rest would make everything else easier.

We are going fully non compliant with any  hardware/actor/vendor.
00:33:54	Reno - ZKNOX:	Will the MLDSA-MPC algorithm used under the hood be published soon ? How does it compare to other proposals ?
00:34:32	Conor Deegan:	What is the upper limit for number of parties with this MPC?
00:34:55	Conor Deegan:	Thank you

00:52:32	Reno - ZKNOX:	this has been done
